decisions.title_en: Anthropic to close $30B+ round at $900B+ valuation as soon as next week — tops OpenAI
decisions.reason: Brand-new financing-close confirmation. Bloomberg 5-22 reports Sequoia / Dragoneer / Altimeter / Greenoaks each putting ~$2B as co-leads. story_key not in lookback (lookback only has 5-20 anthropic-q2-revenue-first-profit, which is the revenue disclosure, not the round close).

decisions.title_en: Grok adds Vercel, Canva, Gamma, S&P Global connectors
decisions.reason: Brand-new product surface expansion landed 5-22. story_key not in lookback. Distinct from earlier SpaceXAI / Grok 4.3 / Grok Build stories.

decisions.title_en: Adobe Firefly Creativity Connector coming to Google Gemini — Photoshop / Premiere / Illustrator orchestrated from chat
decisions.reason: Adobe 5-19 published Creativity Connector announcement, distinct product surface from prior I/O coverage (which focused on Gemini models). story_key not in lookback.

decisions.title_en: TeamPCP Mini Shai-Hulud worm: 639 malicious npm packages published via @antv compromise in 1 hour
decisions.reason: Largest single-hour npm attack wave to date hit 5-19 via @antv maintainer compromise. Follows 5-11 TanStack wave but is a new event, new scale, new technique (provenance-attestation indistinguishable). story_key not in lookback.

decisions.title_en: Huang: Nvidia has 'largely conceded' China's AI chip market to Huawei
decisions.reason: Returning from 5-18 lookback entry where Huang said 'market 早晚会开' / China revenue at zero. New on 5-21: Huang explicitly admits Nvidia has 'largely conceded' to Huawei — a sharp tonal shift from 'wait and see' to 'lost battle'. Substantive new information.

decisions.title_en: Vatican confirms Chris Olah (not Jack Clark) joins Pope Leo XIV at Magnifica Humanitas release tomorrow; Pope to speak personally breaking precedent
decisions.reason: Returning from 5-18 lookback. New info: (1) Anthropic representative is co-founder Chris Olah, NOT Jack Clark as earlier reports indicated; (2) Pope will personally speak at the presentation, breaking centuries of precedent; (3) co-presenter panel confirmed (3 cardinals + 2 women theologians: Fernández, Czerny, Rowlands, Lushombo); (4) full title confirmed 'On the Protection of Human Dignity in the Age of Artificial Intelligence'. Release tomorrow 11:30am Vatican Synod Hall.

decisions.title_en: Google bundles AI Co-Scientist + AlphaEvolve + WeatherNext into single Gemini for Science platform
decisions.reason: 5-19 I/O science-track announcement: unified Gemini for Science platform combining AI Co-Scientist (hypothesis generation), AlphaEvolve (algorithm optimization), WeatherNext, plus AlphaGenome / AlphaEarth. Distinct from the lookback Gemini 3.5 Flash / Antigravity / WebMCP stories. story_key not in lookback.

decisions.title_en: Bezos finally describes Project Prometheus: 'modern CAD', 'nothing to do with robotics', 120 hires from OpenAI / DeepMind / Meta / xAI
decisions.reason: First-time public description of stealth $38B startup from Bezos himself on 5-20: 'artificial general engineer' for designing physical objects, 'a modern version of CAD'. Also brushed off AI-bubble concerns. story_key not in lookback (no prior Prometheus entries).

decisions.title_en: Nadella demos 'Chain of Debate' multi-agent control + names ex-Snap Jacob Andreou EVP over unified Copilot org
decisions.reason: 5-21 Fortune cover story: Nadella demos 'Chain of Debate' (instruct + control multiple AI agents in parallel), Microsoft merges commercial + consumer Copilot orgs under ex-Snap exec Jacob Andreou as EVP, Copilot DAU growing 3× YoY, $190B 2026 capex. Substantial new strategic disclosure. story_key not in lookback.
